steps.title: Identify the contrast signal
steps.content:
The first sentence states that era names uniformly describe evolutionary phases.

The second sentence immediately introduces period names and says they are of diverse origins.

These are opposing ideas: uniformity versus diversity. The transition must signal this contrast.

steps.title: Match the contrast to the choices
steps.content:
On the other hand directly expresses opposition: eras follow one pattern, but periods follow another.

The other three transitions fail to capture this relationship—therefore suggests consequence, in turn suggests sequence, and furthermore suggests addition.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
